name: English

items.title: Introduction to Literary Studies: The Art of Reading and Writing

sections.label: Three English Courses (305+, one must be British lit before 1800)
sections.description: Three ENG courses numbered 305 or above. At least one must be in British literature before 1800. Confirm with department which courses satisfy the British lit before 1800 requirement.

sections.label: Two Additional Courses
sections.description: Two additional courses; one must be an ENG course. The second may be ENG, CRW, or French/Spanish lit in translation (FRE-145, FRE-146, FRE-148, SPA-148).

options.title: Seminar in Literature: United States Pluralism (WE)

notes: Ten full-credit courses required for the major.
